_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Sideways drift into Complacency is the most probable path as fear_greed sits near bottom levels but institutional bid distortions prevent committed upward momentum.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial agreement — both see potential upward drift, but analyst is cautious about churning while narrative is more bullish on accumulation dynamics
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 35 with funding dropping below 0.003% and BTC 30d momentum turning positive
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX breaks above 22 or fear_greed drops below 22 with BTC closing below $62K
